scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix forntend" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "cd ml_service && uvicorn api.main:app --reload --port 8000"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix forntend" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "cd ml_service && uvicorn api.main:app --reload --port 8000"
scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix forntend && npm install --prefix backend && pip install -r ml_service/requirements.txt
